SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.tool

Annotation Interface JkDep

@Retention(SOURCE) @Target(TYPE) @Repeatable(JkImports.class) public @interface JkDep
Adds an element to jeka-src classpath. It can specify a library referenced in a repository (as "com.google.guava:guava:18.0") or file pattern relative to the project directory (as "../lib-folder/mylib.jar" or "libs/*.jar")

    Class
    Description
    static @interface 
    JkDep.JkImports
    Repeatable container.

    Required Element
    Description
    String
    value
    The dependency to import.

  • Element Details

    • value

      String value
      The dependency to import. It can be a module dependency (as "com.google.guava:guava:18.0") or a file dependency (as "../lib-folder.mylib.jar").
